articles.title: Photos: Highlights from the 2026 Boston Pride for the People celebration
articles.description:
This year's theme for Boston's Pride festivities, which took place downtown June 6, was "Pride as Protest."

The post Photos: Highlights from the 2026 Boston Pride for the People celebration appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.description:
“Hadley was the kind of child who brought people together without even trying,” her obituary reads. “To know Hadley was to love her.”
